container.required_gates: container and cluster analysis, promoted domain

daemon.required_gates: transport capability negotiation and reconnect contract pending

packet-inspection.required_gates: platform/system dependency and lifecycle coverage pending

stable-core.required_gates: canonical registry, policy gate, typed results, sync/async tests

ai-integration.description: AI-assisted finding analysis and payload generation

findings-reporting.description: Finding storage, correlation, and report generation

stress-testing.description: Network stress testing and DoS simulation
